summary: Tested Post Delete, Edit Post modal with ALL session fields, Session Date display, and Recent Locations API. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Delete works via three-dot menu with confirmation modal, Edit modal shows all session condition fields (wave height, period, direction, wind speed/direction, tide status/height), Session date banner shows 'Session from [date]' with 'Conditions from this day' badge for historical posts.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Post Delete works via three-dot menu with confirmation modal. 2) Edit Post modal shows ALL session fields including wave height, period, direction, wind speed/direction, tide status/height in expandable 'Session Conditions' section. 3) Session date banner shows 'Session from Tue, Mar 31' with 'Conditions from this day' badge for historical posts. 4) Recent Locations API returns user's recent surf locations for auto-fill.

features_verified.post_delete_via_menu: PASS - Delete option in three-dot menu opens confirmation modal
features_verified.post_delete_confirmation: PASS - Shows 'Delete Post?' with warning and Cancel/Delete buttons
features_verified.edit_post_modal_opens: PASS - Edit option in menu opens EditPostModal
features_verified.edit_modal_session_date_field: PASS - Session Date date picker present
features_verified.session_date_banner: PASS - Shows 'Session from Tue, Mar 31' for historical posts
features_verified.conditions_from_this_day_badge: PASS - Shows 'Conditions from this day' badge for historical posts with conditions
features_verified.session_conditions_display: PASS - Shows wave height (3.5ft@10s), wind (12.5mph), tide (Falling 1.8ft)

bugs_fixed.session_date_update_error: Fixed - Backend was trying to set date object on DateTime column, now converts string to datetime properly
bugs_fixed.edit_modal_date_input_warning: Fixed - Frontend now extracts date part from ISO datetime string for date input

console_errors_noted: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - 404 (not related to tested features)
